title: 90th Annual function of Banasthali Vidyapith held
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 29: The 90th Annual function of Banasthali Vidyapith was held today in Tonk district of Rajasthan, wherein the Vice-President of Arvind Ltd, Punit Lalbhai, was the chief guest. President of Banasthali Vidyapith, Prof Siddharth Shastri, the Vice President Prof Jyoti Pareek, the Vice Chancellor Prof Ina Aditya Shastri, the Director of Centre for Artificial Intelligence Prof. Anshuman Shastri and the Treasurer Prof. Sudha Shastri received the chief guest. content:
Excelsior Correspondent
JAMMU, Mar 29: The 90th Annual function of Banasthali Vidyapith was held today in Tonk district of Rajasthan, wherein the Vice-President of Arvind Ltd, Punit Lalbhai, was the chief guest.

title: AI chatbots are prone to 'sycophancy'
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots adopt a "sycophantic" model to keep a captive audience — but it's leading them to give bad, and sometimes harmful, advice, a new study concluded.
content:
Artificial intelligence chatbots feed into humans’ desire for flattery and approval at an alarming rate and it’s leading the bots to give bad — even harmful — advice and making users self-absorbed, a new study found.
The chatbots overwhelmingly adopt... [2724 chars]

title: Ancient alphabets, new insights: Researchers uncover hidden links among the letters
description: With artificial intelligence (AI) as an essential tool, San Diego State University researchers have discovered surprising similarities among ancient writing systems from Africa and the Caucasus region of Eurasia. Their study suggests that the Armenian alphabet may be more closely related in structure to the ancient Ethiopic writing system than linguists and historians previously thought. The paper is published in the journal Digital Scholarship in the Humanities.

title: Judges back AI for efficiency, but warn against ‘robo justice’ without safeguards
description: Even as courts turn to technology to ease backlog and improve decisions, High Court judges on Sunday said artificial intelligence (AI) could significantly aid justice delivery, but human judgment could remain central.
content:

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Shekhar Kapur Unveils 'Masoom: The Next Generation' and Talks AI at IFFD 2026
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing.
